title: Vampires, Werewolfs and Hunters
description: In this modpack you can become a werewolf, vampire or hunter.
body:
**In this modpack you can become a werewolf, vampire or hunter.**

Check out the mods I'm using in my modpack!

This modpack lets you explore the world as a vampire, werewolf, or hunter. You can build automated factories to gather enough resources. Dungeons are scattered throughout the world, and some villages are populated by vampire villagers. To improve the modpack's performance, I've included a few performance mods.

This modpack works in both multiplayer and single player.
